payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Rectangular beige/cream pillow cover with multiple horizontal gray-blue stripes and a visible woven cotton/linen-like texture; pillow appears slightly flattened and is edge-cropped in the photo, approximately 0.5 m from the camera.
